data.title: United Therapeutics Reports Early Success For External Liver Support In Acute Failure
data.description:
United Therapeutics Corp. (NASDAQ:UTHR) on Monday shared results from its phase 1 study of miroliverELAP, an external liver assist product, in patients with acute forms of liver failure.

Developed by Miromatrix Medical, a wholly owned subsidiary of United Therapeutics, miroliverELAP consists of an external blood circuit and a single-use bioengineered liver sustained outside of the human body to provide temporary liver support to patients.

The bioengineered liver is manufactured by seeding a decellularized porcine liver scaffold with allogeneic human endothelial cells and human liver cells isolated from donated human livers.

The donated human livers are not suitable for transplantation and are provided by organ procurement organizations.

Positive Phase 1 Results for MiroliverELAP

In the study, five patients with acute liver failure who were not candidates for a liver transplant were treated with miroliverELAP for at least 44 hours.

The treatment met its primary endpoint of survival during the study, with no unexpected serious adverse events reported over a subsequent 32-day follow-up period.

The positive results highlight the potential of miroliverELAP to provide critical liver support for patients facing dire circumstances due to acute liver failure.

Full study results will be presented and published in the second half of 2026.

UTHR Stock Technical Indicators Overview

United Therapeutics’ stock is currently trading 2.7% below its 20-day simple moving average (SMA) and 2.5% below its 50-day SMA, but is 3.7% above its 100-day SMA, demonstrating some longer-term strength. Shares have increased approximately 26.89% over the past 12 months and are currently positioned closer to their 52-week highs than lows.

The RSI is at 39.40, which is considered neutral territory, while MACD is below its signal line, indicating bearish pressure on the stock. The combination of neutral RSI and bearish MACD suggests mixed momentum.

  • Key Resistance: $512.50
  • Key Support: $470.00

Upcoming Earnings: Analysts’ EPS and Revenue Forecasts

Investors are looking ahead to the company’s next earnings report on February 25, 2026, with analysts expecting earnings per share of $6.82, up from $6.19 from the same quarter last year and revenue of $810.08 million, up from $735.90 million from the same quarter last year.

EPS Estimate: $6.82 (Up from $6.19 YoY)

Revenue Estimate: $810.08 Million (Up from $735.90 Million YoY)

Analyst Consensus: Buy Rating ($447.43 Avg Price Target)

Benzinga Edge Scores Highlight UTHR’s Strengths

Below is the Benzinga Edge scorecard for United Therapeutics, highlighting its strengths and weaknesses compared to the broader market:

  • Value Rank: 61.88 — The stock is fairly valued relative to peers.
  • Quality Rank: 75.91 — The company maintains a strong balance sheet.
  • Momentum Rank: 86.84 — The stock is outperforming the broader market.

The Verdict: United Therapeutics’s Benzinga Edge signal reveals a strong momentum setup with a solid quality score. While the value rank suggests fair valuation, the high momentum score indicates that the stock is currently in a favorable trend.

ETFs with Significant UTHR Exposure

  • Invesco S&P MidCap Quality ETF (NYSE:XMHQ): 3.55% Weight
  • First Trust Health Care AlphaDEX Fund (NYSE:FXH): 2.44% Weight
  • Simplify Health Care ETF (NYSE:PINK): 3.24% Weight

Price Action: UTHR stock is up 0.44% at $471 during the premarket session at the last check on Monday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Boeing Expectations Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
data.description:
The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) will release earnings for its fourth quarter before the opening bell on Tuesday, Jan. 27.

Analysts expect the Arlington, Virginia-based company to report fourth-quarter loss of 39 cents per share. That’s lesser from the loss of $5.90 per share in the year-ago period. The consensus estimate for Boeing's quarterly revenue is $22.47 billion (it reported $15.24 billion last year), according to Benzinga Pro.

On Jan. 13, Boeing said it delivered 600 airplanes in 2025.

Shares of Boeing rose 0.3% to close at $252.15 on Friday.

Benzinga readers can access the latest analyst ratings on the Analyst Stock Ratings page. Readers can sort by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, rating change or other variables.

Let's have a look at how Benzinga's most-accurate analysts have rated the company in the recent period.

  • Bernstein analyst Douglas Harned maintained an Outperform rating and raised the price target from $277 to $298 on Jan. 15, 2026. This analyst has an accuracy rate of 54%.
  • Citigroup analyst John Godyn maintained a Buy rating and raised the price target from $265 to $270 on Jan. 13, 2026. This analyst has an accuracy rate of 64%.
  • Tigress Financial analyst Ivan Feinseth maintained a Buy rating with a price target of $275 on Dec. 29, 2025. This analyst has an accuracy rate of 73%.
  • JP Morgan analyst Seth Seifman maintained an Overweight rating and raised the price target from $240 to $245 on Dec. 19, 2025. This analyst has an accuracy rate of 86%.
  • Susquehanna analyst Charles Minervino maintained a Positive rating and cut the price target from $270 to $255 on Nov. 12, 2025. This analyst has an accuracy rate of 75%

data.title: How To Trade SPY, QQQ, AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL, META, TSLA Using Technical Analysis
data.description:
Good Morning Traders!

Today kicks off a very important week for markets, with the FOMC rate decision and Jerome Powell press conference scheduled for Wednesday. Heading into that event, traders will be closely watching incoming data for any signals that could influence rate expectations or forward guidance. 

At 8:30AM ET, the focus will be on November Preliminary Durable Goods Orders along with Capital Goods Orders and Shipments excluding aircraft, which are key measures of business investment. These reports can shape expectations around economic momentum heading into the Fed meeting. At 10:30AM ET, the January Dallas Fed Manufacturing Activity will offer insight into regional manufacturing conditions. 

Treasury activity will also be in focus, with a 3 and 6 Month Bill Auction at 11:30AM ET followed by a 2 Year Note Auction at 1PM ET. With positioning already cautious, expect intraday volatility to remain elevated as traders balance data, rates, and upcoming Fed risk

Now, we will discuss SPY, QQQ, AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL, META, and TSLA.

SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY)

SPY is currently trading around 688.50 as the market enters a pivotal week with major macro catalysts ahead. Buyers are attempting to stabilize price above this zone, which has acted as an important balance area. If SPY can continue to hold firm here, a push toward the 690.25 region may develop as dip buyers gain confidence. Sustained strength above that area could allow price to probe into the 692.00 zone, where sellers are likely to be more active ahead of the FOMC decision. 

If SPY loses 688.50, downside pressure could increase quickly as traders reduce risk ahead of midweek events. A move into 686.75 would be the first area to watch for responsive buyers. Failure there opens the door toward 684.75, which would suggest risk sentiment is deteriorating. Continued weakness into that zone would reflect positioning adjustments rather than outright panic, but momentum could accelerate if sellers remain in control.

Invesco QQQ Trust Series 1 (QQQ)

QQQ is currently trading around 621.50, sitting near a key inflection zone for growth stocks. Buyers are attempting to defend this level as large cap tech remains sensitive to interest rate expectations. Holding above 621.50 could allow price to work higher toward 623.75, where prior supply has shown up. A clean reclaim of that area may open a path toward 626.00 if risk appetite improves. 

If QQQ slips below 621.50, sellers may test downside liquidity into 619.50. A breakdown through that level would suggest traders are de risking ahead of FOMC and could lead to a rotation toward 617.25. Sustained pressure below there would indicate broader weakness across tech, particularly if yields move higher.

Apple Inc. (AAPL)

Apple is currently trading around 250.50 as buyers attempt to hold a critical support zone. This level has been an area where dip buyers have consistently shown interest. If Apple can remain above 250.50, price may grind higher toward 252.25, with further upside potential into 254.00 if the tape stabilizes. 

If Apple loses 250.50, sellers may press price into 248.75 fairly quickly. A failure there could open a move toward 246.50, which would reflect defensive positioning in mega cap names. Continued downside would likely be more technical in nature rather than company specific.

Microsoft Corp. (MSFT)

Microsoft is currently trading around 467.00, attempting to build acceptance after recent volatility. Buyers will want to see price hold above this level to support a move into 469.50. If momentum builds, MSFT could work into the 472.00 area, particularly if broader tech stabilizes. 

If MSFT cannot hold 467.00, downside pressure may push price into 464.75. A breakdown below that level would signal fading confidence and could lead to a test of 461.50. Weakness here would likely be tied to macro factors rather than fundamentals.

NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA)

NVIDIA is currently trading around 186.25 as traders remain cautious ahead of major macro events. Buyers are attempting to defend this level as a short term pivot. If support holds, a move toward 188.75 may develop, with potential extension into 191.00 if sentiment improves. 

If NVDA breaks below 186.25, sellers could push price into 183.75. Failure to hold there would expose the 181.50 region, signaling reduced risk appetite across semiconductors. Downside movement would likely be sharp but headline driven.

Alphabet Inc Class A (GOOGL)

Alphabet is currently trading around 326.50, holding within a broader consolidation range. Buyers are watching this area closely as a base for potential continuation. Strength above this level could allow a move into 329.25, with further upside toward 332.00 if the market firms up. 

If GOOGL slips below 326.50, sellers may test downside liquidity into 323.75. A sustained move lower would suggest caution ahead of FOMC and could bring 321.00 into play. Price action here remains sensitive to overall tech flows.

Meta Platforms Inc (META)

Meta is currently trading around 662.25, showing relative strength compared to other large cap names. Buyers are attempting to maintain control above this level, which could lead to a push toward 666.00. Continued strength may allow price to stretch into 669.50 if risk appetite remains intact. 

If META loses 662.25, sellers may pressure price into 658.75. A break below there would suggest rotation out of higher beta names and could lead to a test of 655.50. Any downside should be monitored for buyer response rather than immediate continuation.

Tesla Inc. (TSLA)

Tesla is currently trading around 445.75 as volatility remains elevated. Buyers are attempting to stabilize price above this zone after recent swings. Holding here could allow a move toward 449.50, with further upside into 453.00 if momentum improves. 

If TSLA falls below 445.75, selling pressure may push price into 441.50. Continued weakness would open the door toward 437.75, reflecting traders stepping back ahead of macro uncertainty. Tesla remains one of the more reactive names to broader risk shifts.

Final Word: . Stay disciplined, manage risk, and trade safely.

Benzinga Disclaimer: This article is from an unpaid external contributor. It does not represent Benzinga’s reporting and has not been edited for content or accuracy.

data.title: Top 3 Real Estate Stocks That May Fall Off A Cliff In January
data.description:
As of Jan. 26, 2026, three stocks in the real estate sector could be flashing a real warning to investors who value momentum as a key criteria in their trading decisions.

The RSI is a momentum indicator, which compares a stock’s strength on days when prices go up to its strength on days when prices go down. When compared to a stock’s price action, it can give traders a better sense of how a stock may perform in the short term. An asset is typically considered overbought when the RSI is above 70, according to Benzinga Pro.

Here's the latest list of major overbought players in this sector.

Alexandria Real Estate Equities Inc (NYSE:ARE)

  • On Jan. 14, JP Morgan analyst Anthony Paolone maintained Alexandria Real Estate with a Neutral and lowered the price target from $65 to $63. The company's stock gained around 23% over the past month and has a 52-week high of $105.14.
  • RSI Value: 78.6                                
  • ARE Price Action: Shares of Alexandria Real Estate Equities gained 2.8% to close at $59.69 on Friday.
  • Edge Stock Ratings: 5.05 Momentum score.

Easterly Government Properties Inc (NYSE:DEA)

  • On Oct. 27, Easterly Government Properties posted upbeat quarterly results. “We’ve delivered another quarter of strong results,” said Darrell Crate, President & CEO of Easterly Government Properties. “This underscores Easterly’s ability to deliver consistent, compounding growth over time.” The company's stock gained around 11% over the past month and has a 52-week high of $29.74.
  • RSI Value: 75
  • DEA Price Action: Shares of Easterly Government Properties rose 1.1% to close at $23.60 on Friday.

Alpine Income Property Trust Inc (NYSE:PINE)

  • On Jan. 20, Alpine Income Property Trust acquired a property in Aspen, Colorado for $10.0 million. The company's stock gained around 11% over the past month and has a 52-week high of $18.32.
  • RSI Value: 74.1
  • PINE Price Action: Shares of Alpine Income Property Trust gained 1.9% to close at $18.22 on Friday.

Learn more about BZ Edge Rankings—click to see scores for other stocks in the sector and see how they compare.
